summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Trophy Management features completed successfully. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend/UI testing verified all 4 key features: Admin Trophies page, League Control Room trophy section, Tournament Control Room trophy section, and user's personal trophies.

admin_trophy_stats_endpoint.response_structure: Returns total (48), by_type (dict), recent (list of 20 trophies)

award_tournament_trophies_endpoint.note: Tournament TEST_LC_tb901 has status='knockout' (not completed), so no trophies awarded but endpoint returns success

duplicate_prevention.note: Calling award-trophies twice does NOT create duplicate trophies

admin_trophies_page_ui.stats_cards: 4 cards visible: Trofei Totali (48), Trofei Lega (3), Trofei Torneo (0), Trofei Settimanali (45)
admin_trophies_page_ui.distribution_chart: Shows weekly_best (32), weekly_perfect (13), league_champion (1), league_second (1), league_third (1)
admin_trophies_page_ui.recent_trophies_table: Shows user, type, competition, date columns

league_control_room_zona_pericolo.description: Shows explanation about Champion, 2nd, 3rd place trophies

tournament_control_room_zona_pericolo.description: Shows explanation about Champion, Finalist, Semifinalist trophies

test_scenarios_verified: 1. GET /api/admin/trophies/stats returns 200 with total, by_type, recent - PASS
2. Trophy stats structure has correct fields and types - PASS
4. Award league trophies requires admin permission (403 for regular user) - PASS
5. Award league trophies returns 404 for invalid league_id - PASS
7. Award tournament trophies returns 404 for invalid tournament_id - PASS
8. POST /api/admin/trophies/backfill returns results with weekly/league/tournament processed counts - PASS
9. Backfill response includes errors field (even if empty) - PASS
10. GET /api/trophies/my returns user's personal trophies with correct structure - PASS
11. Calling award-trophies twice does NOT create duplicate trophies - PASS
12. Admin Panel Trofei page loads with stats cards and backfill button - PASS
13. League Control Room Zona Pericolo shows Trofei Campione section - PASS
14. Tournament Control Room Zona Pericolo shows Trofei Torneo section - PASS
15. Trophy total matches sum of by_type counts - PASS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing trophies from previous backfill (48 total: 32 weekly_best, 13 weekly_perfect, 1 league_champion, 1 league_second, 1 league_third)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trophy management feature fully implemented and tested. The admin panel has a dedicated Trofei page accessible from sidebar. League and Tournament Control Rooms both have trophy award buttons in the Zona Pericolo tab. The backfill endpoint processes all completed matchdays and awards weekly trophies (best score, perfect predictions) as well as champion trophies for completed leagues. Duplicate prevention via MongoDB unique index works correctly. Tournament trophies require tournament status='completed' with a finished final round to be awarded.
